pages.text: $(thing)Salads$() are a meal prepared in a $(thing)Bowl$() from up to five $(thing)$(n)$(t:#tfc:usable_in_salad)Ingredients$().$(br2)Salads are one of the simplest meals to make, and just require a $(l:cooking/bowls)Bowl$(). First, hold the $(thing)Bowl$() and press $(item)$(k:key.use)$() while holding $(item)$(k:key.sneak)$(). This will open the salad screen.$(br)Place ingredients in the top slots and then remove the salad from the bottom slot when you are done.

pages.title: Salads
pages.text: Salads are dynamic meal items. The ingrediants used will determine what type of salad is made and the $(l:tfc:cooking/food_and_water#nutrients)Nutrients$() it contains.$(br2)$(t:§70.75§r§l∑§r§7Ingredients§r)To calculate the nutritional value; take the sum of every ingredients nutrition and multiply by 0.75
